proven.claim: PROVEN: totalProven = sum of all c.proven.length
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2, P6
; LINE: 438
; PROVEN: totalProven = sum of all c.proven.length
(declare-const num_contracts Int)
(declare-const proven_0 Int)
(declare-const proven_1 Int)
(declare-const proven_2 Int)
(declare-const proven_3 Int)
(declare-const total_proven Int)
(assert (= num_contracts 4))
(assert (>= proven_0 0))
(assert (>= proven_1 0))
(assert (>= proven_2 0))
(assert (>= proven_3 0))
(assert (= total_proven (+ proven_0 proven_1 proven_2 proven_3)))
(assert (not (= total_proven (+ proven_0 proven_1 proven_2 proven_3))))
(check-sat)
; unsat → total_proven is computed by summation, always consistent
